_README: Set a candidate key (e.g. 'rule:edge:imports_cors_shared' or 'sentinel:rls_open_policy') to {"status": "approved|rejected|snoozed", "note": "..."} to drop it from promotion_queue.md. The orchestrator never overwrites this file.
_SWEEP_DISPOSITION_2026-06-07: 24 Grounded-MCP-Sweep critiques dispositioned by owner. They collapse into 6 root-cause work items (W1 tap-target base rule, W2 modal-a11y retrofit, W3 status-enum guard, W4 index a11y, W5 WHShell seam, W6 judgment). 23 approved / 1 rejected. Owner steers: (Q1) tap-target rule = 44px EVERYWHERE, no exceptions incl. filter-chips; (Q2) #5 onboarding = align verdict+CTA+ladder on ONE first action.

sweep:platform-wide:interactive-min-heig.note: W1 PRIMARY. Establish one .wh-tappable base (min-height:44px on button/[role=button]/tab/chip/pill/icon-btn) + extend validate_mobile to compute PER-ELEMENT box size (current check_touch_targets is inline-style-only = BLIND SPOT #1/#2, structurally can't see class/padding-sized controls). Owner: 44px everywhere, NO exception list. Closes the whole class instead of chasing it per-page.

sweep:platform:companion-overlay-tap-tar.note: W1. Shared companion launcher/overlay (wh-ai-trigger 22px, mic/send 14px, close 9px) sub-44 on every page -> fix once in shell component to >=44px.

sweep:platform-wide:nav-hub-mode-btn-tap.note: W1. .wh-hub-mode-btn 83x26 ships in nav-hub.js -> sub-44 on every page; bump in shell.

sweep:dayplanner:btn-icon-tap.note: W1. .btn-icon (sidebar collapse, prev/next date) 28-30px -> 44px; primary date nav below floor.

sweep:logbook:voice-btn-consistency.note: W1. Bake 44px into the shared .wh-tappable class so a dropped min-h utility can't shrink a header action (the Voice-Journal failure mode). = the base-rule work.

sweep:resume:dedupe-toggle-font.note: W1 (+a11y). promote-dedupe hit-area -> 44px via base rule; ALSO bump the 13.3px label to >=14px. Lone sub-spec control on an otherwise clean page.

sweep:inventory:min-height-unset-antipat.note: W1. inline style=min-height:unset on .btn-* defeats the 44px default (inline beats media query, bites phones). Row icon buttons -> 44px hitbox; the per-element validate_mobile upgrade catches this inline-unset smell that the class check misses.

sweep:voicejournal:filter-chip-density.note: W1. Owner Q1 = 44px EVERYWHERE: voice-journal .filter-chip 36px -> 44px (overrides the prior 'deliberately compact' framing; one rule, no per-page drift).

sweep:pm-scheduler:filter-chip-tap.note: W1. Owner Q1 = 44px EVERYWHERE: pm-scheduler status filter-chips 32px -> 44px. Resolves the chip-drift the critic flagged between this page and voice-journal.

sweep:platform:modal-a11y-helper.note: W2 PRIMARY. Build shared whModalA11y(modalEl,{onClose,labelledBy}) -> role=dialog+aria-modal+accessible-name+ESC-close+Tab-trap+focus-restore. Retrofit existing hand-rolled modals (logbook 8, index inline -> migrate). Ratchets validate_modal_a11y.py C7 debt baseline (13) down as modals are migrated.

sweep:platform:inline-styled-modals-evad.note: W2. validate_modal_a11y.py keys on class='fixed inset-0' so inline style=position:fixed;inset:0 modals evade the C7 ratchet (pm-scheduler 3 modals w/ ZERO keydown handlers, dayplanner .modal-overlay). Widen validator to also match inline fixed/inset overlays, THEN retrofit with whModalA11y.

sweep:pm-scheduler:edit-modal-a11y.note: W2. #pm-edit-modal role=null/aria-modal=null/no ESC/no trap -> apply whModalA11y.

sweep:platform:status-enum-constants.note: W3. The dayplanner overdue bug (filter checked item_status!='closed' but schedule_items enum is done/in_progress/pending -> counted DONE as overdue, 6 vs 3 DB) was invisible to every static gate. Centralize per-table status enums in a shared JS constant + a validator that greps filter string-literals against the actual DB enum so a typo'd status can't silently miscount a KPI. High value (real bug already shipped+fixed; this is the systemic guard).

sweep:index:pwd-reveal-keyboard.note: W4. Show/hide-password toggles (index.html:2509/2546/2555) are tabindex=-1 -> keyboard users can't reveal. WCAG 2.1.1. Fix: drop -1 (keep last in field tab order) OR labelled 'Show password' checkbox.

sweep:index:auth-tabs-aria.note: W4. #tab-signin/#tab-signup are plain buttons -> add role=tablist/tab/tabpanel + aria-selected (WAI-ARIA Tabs pattern). Dialog already has role+aria-modal from the Wave-0 fix.

sweep:index:whshell-seam.note: W5 (low priority, TASTE). Expose read-only window.WHShell={mode(),identity(),role()} for testability + cross-page consistency with sibling resume.html's window.WHResume.

sweep:index:first-action-alignment.note: W6. Owner Q2 = APPROVE. Align verdict + primary CTA + onboarding ladder on ONE activating first action for a zero-data novice (Hick's law). Suggested canonical action: 'Log your first job' (data-creating activation); owner sets the final canonical action.

sweep:index:landing-cta-density.note: W6 won't-fix. The critic itself says 57 CTAs on a logged-out marketing landing is 'likely FINE' (Jakob's law for marketing pages) and recommended no change without a conversion goal. Logged for honesty; reopen only if a conversion goal is set.

_UFAI_WAVE0_1_DISPOSITION_2026-06-07: 6 critiques from the C-battery re-sweep (Wave 0 index + Wave 1 logbook/inventory/pm-scheduler), dispositioned by the agent under owner's 'go for it' delegation. 5 approved / 0 rejected; 1 (overdue-KPI) approved-with-root-cause for an owner architecture call.

sweep:platform:header-logo-tap-aria.note: Fix PER-PAGE during each wave's sweep, NOT a blanket tool — the header markup varies too much (about/feedback wrap logo+brand-text in a flex already >=44; community/hive ship a bare 28px ; some logos aren't links). A regex tool would mis-edit. Already fixed inline on index/logbook/inventory + pm-scheduler back-link; the battery catches it on every remaining page. Skip *-test.html.

sweep:pm-scheduler:overdue-kpi-vs-dashbo.note: ROOT-CAUSED (needs an OWNER architecture/labeling decision, NOT an auto-fix). 'PM Overdue' is sourced from TWO different canonical views: home dashboard pm_overdue_count = count(v_pm_compliance_truth WHERE is_due) = PER-ASSET (26); pm-scheduler #stat-overdue = count(v_pm_scope_items_truth WHERE is_overdue) = PER-SCOPE-ITEM. Different granularity under the SAME label -> latent cross-surface drift (the code itself documents a prior 21-vs-0 incident, only partially fixed). SOP Phase-4.7 mandate: collapse a KPI computed on >1 surface to ONE shared source, OR relabel so users see 'N assets need PM' vs 'N tasks overdue'. Owner picks unify-vs-relabel.

sweep:pm-scheduler:fab-obscured-conn-chi.note: Real Major (FAB 52x52 -> ~52x8 usable, obscured by the global #wh-conn-chip). Cross-element/shell positioning — fix in a focused batch: page FABs must sit ABOVE the global connection chip (consistent bottom offset) OR the conn-chip must not occupy the FAB corner. Likely affects every bottom-right-FAB page, so verify across pages before shipping; deferred from the per-page inline fixes for that reason.

sweep:platform:cls-list-popin.note: Approved, batch with sweep:index-dashboard:cls-tile-popin. Reserve space (min-height/skeleton) for async KPI tiles + list rows so the page doesn't reflow on data arrival (measured CLS 0.08-0.13 on dashboard + inventory). Medium effort, not blocking; do as one skeleton pass across data pages. Re-confirm vs a production-like load (local Flask inflates CLS).

sweep:index-dashboard:cls-tile-popin.note: Same class as cls-list-popin — batch together. Home-dashboard KPI tiles + signature-alert banner pop in without reserved space.

sweep:platform:page-db-seam.note: Low-priority TASTE. Expose a read-only window.WH<Page>={db,get} (or surface the memoized window._whSupabaseClient) on data pages so grounded sweeps can read canonical parity in-browser like index(window.db)/resume(WHResume). Until then, parity falls back to cross-surface text match + the journey-hive-isolation spec. Deferred.
